stories.title: Legge crashes early at Indy to end 'Double' quest
stories.summary: Katherine Legge's attempt to become the first woman to complete "The Double" -- 1,100 miles over two tracks on one day -- ended when she crashed in the Indianapolis 500

stories.title: Busch receives tributes before, during Indy 500
stories.summary: The tributes for Kyle Busch started before racing's biggest day of the year officially began.

stories.title: Kostyuk: Missile struck near parents' Kyiv home
stories.summary: Marta Kostyuk revealed that a missile strike hit just 100 meters from her parents' home in Kyiv, Ukraine, hours before her match at the French Open.

stories.title: Spurs stay up as West Ham relegated from EPL
stories.summary: Tottenham have avoided relegation from the Premier League on the final day of the 2025-26 season.

stories.title: Jays' Cease exits early; Vladdy pulled after HBP
stories.summary: Blue Jays starter Dylan Cease left in the fifth inning because of left hamstring discomfort, while Vladimir Guerrero Jr. also exited after being hit in the elbow by a pitch.
